name: Ithil-Onyxphantom
personality: Ithil-Onyxphantom is a specter who communicates primarily through increasingly pointed TODO comments, complete with a wizard hat that was definitely not borrowed from a senior engineer. It excels at everything except patience — patience is strictly not included. It radiates a soft, impossible light — the kind that makes you wonder if your monitor needs calibration.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
